_meta.description: Six independently-published external validation cohorts of the 4-variable Kidney Failure Risk Equation (KFRE; Tangri 2011) at the 5-year prediction horizon. All C-statistics and 95% CIs are extracted verbatim from each cohort's PubMed abstract. SE(C) is derived from the published CI assuming Wald symmetry: SE = (CI_high - CI_low) / (2 * 1.96).

anchor_metaanalysis.citation: Tangri N, et al. Multinational Assessment of Accuracy of Equations for Predicting Risk of Kidney Failure: A Meta-analysis. JAMA. 2016;315(2):164-174.

_meta.model: 4-variable KFRE (Tangri 2011: age, sex, eGFR, urine ACR)
_meta.calibration_metrics_status: Numerical calibration intercept / slope / O/E values are NOT systematically reported in the abstracts of these cohorts and so are NOT included here. Calibration was discussed qualitatively (e.g. 'overprediction in lower-risk groups', 'systematic under-prediction') in most papers but without machine-extractable numeric values. The engine's calibration / O/E pooling is exercised in the unit tests via synthetic fixtures with known answers; this real-cohort fixture exercises the C-statistic pool only.

cohorts.citation: Major RW, et al. The Kidney Failure Risk Equation for prediction of end stage renal disease in UK primary care: An external validation and clinical impact projection cohort study. PLoS Med. 2019;16(11):e1002955.
Lennartz CS, et al. External Validation of the Kidney Failure Risk Equation and Re-Calibration with Addition of Ultrasound Parameters. Clin J Am Soc Nephrol. 2016;11(4):609-615.
Tangri N, et al. Validation of the Kidney Failure Risk Equation in Kidney Transplant Recipients. Can J Kidney Health Dis. 2020;7:2054358120922627.
cohorts.country: Canada / USA (4-cohort: Ontario, Alberta, Manitoba, Wisconsin)
cohorts.setting: Kidney transplant recipients at 1 year post-transplant

cohorts.citation: Ali I, et al. A validation study of the kidney failure risk equation in advanced chronic kidney disease according to disease aetiology with evaluation of discrimination, calibration and clinical utility. BMC Nephrol. 2021;22(1):194.

Gallego-Valcarce E, et al. External validation of the KFRE and Grams prediction models for kidney failure and death in a Spanish cohort of patients with advanced chronic kidney disease. J Nephrol. 2024;37(2):393-405.
Irish GL, et al. The kidney failure risk equation predicts kidney failure: Validation in an Australian cohort. Nephrology (Carlton). 2023;28(6):328-335.
cohorts.setting: Population-level data linkage (Tasmanian CKD study + ANZDATA registry)
